name: Determine Limiting Magnitude of VLT M12 Observation
description:
Determine the limiting magnitude of a VLT V-band observation of the globular cluster Messier 12.

1. Launch AstroImageJ and open the FITS image located at `~/AstroImages/limiting_mag/m12_Vcomb.fits`.
2. A list of 20 reference stars with their pixel coordinates and known V magnitudes is provided in `~/AstroImages/limiting_mag/reference_stars.txt`.
3. Perform aperture photometry on at least 8 of these reference stars spanning a range of magnitudes (from bright to faint) using AstroImageJ's measurement tools. Record the Source Counts (flux), Sky Background, and Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) for each.
4. Determine the limiting magnitude of this image, defined as the faintest V magnitude at which a point source is detected with an SNR of approximately 5.
5. Save your results to a new file exactly at `~/AstroImages/limiting_mag/limiting_mag_results.txt`.

The file must follow this exact format:
